steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Text Structure and Purpose question. The question asks for the function of the underlined sentence: "Female cuckoos have been seen quickly laying eggs in the nests of other bird species when those birds are out looking for food." We need to identify what role this specific sentence plays within the passage.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'It introduces a physical feature of female cuckoos that is described later in the text.': The underlined sentence describes behavior (quick egg-laying while birds forage), not any physical feature like size, color, or body part. Nothing later in the text describes a physical feature introduced here. ✗
  • Choice B — 'It describes the appearance of the cuckoo nests mentioned earlier in the text.': The underlined sentence says nothing about the appearance of nests. It describes when and how the egg-laying happens. ✗
  • Choice C — 'It offers a detail about how female cuckoos carry out the behavior discussed in the text.': The preceding sentences establish the general behavior (adult females lay eggs in other nests). The underlined sentence adds the operational detail of how this is done: quickly, and timed for when the host birds are away foraging. This is exactly a detail about carrying out the behavior. ✓
  • Choice D — 'It explains how other birds react to the female cuckoo behavior discussed in the text.': The other birds' reaction (raising the cuckoo chicks) is described in the sentence after the underlined one. The underlined sentence focuses on the cuckoo's own actions, not the host birds' response. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
